title: Phase 6 decision: worktree messaging scope
description: Resolve the Phase 6 open boundary: messages are currently scoped to the project folder/checkout, so agents working in separate git worktrees do not see each other's messages until records are merged. Decide whether V1 accepts checkout-local messaging or needs a shared ledger/message location for worktree-per-agent workflows.
acceptance: An ADR records the decision, rationale, consequences, and deferred alternatives.
docs/roadmap.md Phase 6 no longer has an unresolved messaging-scope boundary.
The decision explicitly covers separate worktrees, normal branches in one checkout, merge behavior, and whether any shared message location is introduced.
If behavior changes, follow-up tasks are added for implementation; if checkout-local messaging remains, docs explain the limitation.
bun test, typecheck, biome check, and waystation validate are clean.
notes: Do this before implementing worktree-aware messaging or inbox behavior. This is a design decision, not a code-heavy task.
